human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for grocery e-commerce boundary discipline, public source quality, order and payment evidence handling, weighted-item and substitution controls, SNAP-sensitive refusal posture, food-safety and recall escalation rules, commercialization notes, and validated contract completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to grocery e-commerce execution, order and basket handling, pick and substitution state, weighted-item evidence, payment and SNAP EBT review, pickup or delivery release control, completion evidence, and pricing, refund, fraud, food-safety, recall, or allergen escalation.

Authority sources cover FTC internet order guidance, NIST legal-metrology and e-commerce price controls, FDA Food Code, FDA recall listings, USDA FNS SNAP online purchasing requirements and technical Q&As, PCI SSC e-commerce payment-security guidance, and GS1 item-identity standards.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal curbside completion, incomplete inputs, missing completion evidence, payment and SNAP mismatch, refund-policy exceptions, food-safety and fraud implications, high-volume intake, terminology fidelity, adjacent-lane rejection, low-confidence escalation, conflicting-policy handling, and recall or allergen stop conditions.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/grocery-and-food-retail/grocery-e-commerce-specialist/ so grocery e-commerce execution remains separate from pricing, guest-services, SNAP program ownership, fraud, food-safety, recall, and operations lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Boundary enforcement remained strong around price overrides, refund exceptions, SNAP interpretation, fraud adjudication, food-safety disposition, and recall or allergen release handling.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated grocery e-commerce specialist that supports evidence-backed order progression and policy-aware escalation.
Runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
